purpose: Structured trip-report corpus feeding generative GLSL + ASCII art via Google AI Studio. Grimoire architecture: dual-schema metadata (Standard / Weird) per trip. Astral projection reports live in their own folder.

trips.title: Shipwrekt: First Transmission
corrections_pass_3: Indra's Net removed — AP material, relocated to astral_projection/ap-0001
open_questions: TRANSCRIPT GAP: scream/god-loop/gatekeeping source material missing
home/stuffness/descent corridor unmapped onto 6-4 plane taxonomy

astral_projection.title: Indra's Net Overflight
astral_projection.status: stub (recovered material — awaiting user's own report)

ingestion_notes.preferred_format: processed markdown with YAML frontmatter, or consolidated JSON when generated
ingestion_notes.seed_policy: glsl_seeds and ascii_seeds are conceptual guides for AI Studio to riff on — not final art to copy
ingestion_notes.metadata_policy: user-estimated recall; blanks are intentional and must be preserved
ingestion_notes.imagery_policy: strain names are labels only — no literal imagery derived from them (no nautical motifs for Shipwrekt)
ingestion_notes.contamination_policy: material not present in RAW or user-RECOVERED sources requires explicit user confirmation before canonization; cross-corpus loop-ins get logged in the integration Corrections Log, not silently deleted
